name: a9_adapter_kernel
outcome_goal: httpx, requests, and aiohttp callsites exist only inside adapters/http_transport.py, and five adapter types converge on that transport.
verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'httpx\.|requests\.|aiohttp\.' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/http_transport.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_adapter_kernel.py'"

jobs.label: a9_adapter_kernel
jobs.prompt: After a7_secret_kernel lands, rebase branch praxis/kernel-adapter on praxis/kernel-secret and consolidate adapter HTTP transport. Touched files: Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/http_transport.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/provider_transport.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/llm_client.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/mcp_task.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/connector_executor.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/integrations/webhook.py. Ensure httpx, requests, and aiohttp callsites exist only in adapters/http_transport.py and five adapter types converge on that transport. File operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.kernel-adapter-consolidation and open a PR to public referencing it. Transport constraint: use admitted CLI transport only; do not use llm_task, HTTP API routes, Anthropic routes, or deprecated Claude 4.6 slugs.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "bad=$(rg 'httpx\.|requests\.|aiohttp\.' 'Code&DBs/Workflow' --type py -l | rg -v 'Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/http_transport.py' || true); test -z \"$bad\" && PYTHONPATH='Code&DBs/Workflow' /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest --noconftest -q 'Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_adapter_kernel.py'"
